rationale: Educ. Code §37.301 merely defines 'board of trustees' for its subchapter. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 37.301. DEFINITION. In this subchapter, "board of trustees" includes the board's designee.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict detected.
